questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '11b9ec5d-eabb-4f88-bbfc-9b304c70c091' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '64cc1454-82da-41e9-b259-d2ced9345703'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '11b9ec5d-eabb-4f88-bbfc-9b304c70c091'; delete from question_items where id = '11b9ec5d-eabb-4f88-bbfc-9b304c70c091';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
